sources.title: ApexVoid Major Fortune Scoring Engineering Model V0

claims.description: Activation is independent from positive or negative quality.
A standalone Major Fortune score uses physical facts and transformations, not normalized Palace Overview scores.

sources.title: Tử Vi Đẩu Số Tân Biên
sources.author: Vân Đằng Thái Thứ Lang
sources.locatorNotes: Table of contents identifies Khởi Hạn around printed page 20 and Luận Đoán Vận Hạn beginning around printed page 248. Exact claim locators still require manual verification.

sources.title: 王亭之談星：四化通論
sources.author: 王亭之
sources.researchClaim: Natal, Major Fortune and smaller time layers each have their own transformations; Major Fortune transformations are associated with palace stem.

sources.title: 5.1 大限宫位走法
sources.researchClaim: A decade advances one palace, the active palace becomes Major Fortune Mệnh, and its TP4C and transformations are inspected.

sources.title: 靜觀天機．紫微斗數現代量化分析
sources.author: 陳俊宏
sources.researchClaim: The Major Fortune chapter is organized around momentum/energy, transformations and structure.

researchQueue.question: Verify exact pages for active Major Fortune palace, TP4C and decade treatment in tracked primary texts.
Verify the exact table/edition and palace-stem derivation used by the current engine.
Collect source-backed same-target transformation interactions before enabling any modifier.
Determine whether entry/core/exit decade phases should ever alter numeric scoring.
